reason: Enabling authentication for remote logging requires existing infrastructure (certificates, TLS/gnutls, and remote server configuration) to be in place. Simply applying the configuration change without the corresponding certificates and remote server setup will cause rsyslog to fail to connect, resulting in a loss of remote logging capabilities.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; Potential loss of remote log transmission if certificates are not configured; Service failure if gnutls/TLS dependencies are missing; Configuration syntax errors in rsyslog.conf or rsyslog.d files
